steps.title: Welcome
steps.content:
Welcome to the GrugBot420 installer!

This wizard will check for required dependencies and help you
install anything that's missing. It should only take a minute.

You'll need:
  • Julia 1.9 or later (the language GrugBot runs on)
  • About 500MB of free disk space

Press Enter to get started, or Ctrl+C to abort.

deps.name: Julia 1.9+
deps.message: Julia is the language runtime that GrugBot needs. Version 1.9 or later required.

steps.title: Configuration
steps.content:
Dependencies are installed! GrugBot will now be configured.

Default settings:
  • Specimen file: grugbot420.specimen.gz (auto-created on first run)
  • Mode: interactive CLI
  • Arousal: 0.5 (neutral)

These can be changed later in bindboss.toml or via GrugBot's /config command.

steps.title: Complete
steps.content:
✓ GrugBot420 is ready to run!

  The application will start automatically after this wizard closes.
  Next time you launch, this wizard will not appear (deps are cached).

  To re-run this wizard:  bindboss reset grugbot420
  To inspect the binary:  bindboss inspect grugbot420

  Happy grugging! 🦖
